site.name: Shankar Binjawadgi
site.title: Shankar Binjawadgi | Product Portfolio
site.description: MBA candidate and product-minded builder focused on AI products, customer discovery, go-to-market strategy, and human-centered product leadership.

about: I am an MBA candidate at the University of Washington Foster School of Business and a product-minded builder with a software engineering foundation. My work centers on AI products, customer discovery, product strategy, and clear go-to-market thinking, with a bias toward understanding real user behavior before shaping solutions.

experiences.title: Master of Business Administration (MBA), Management Science (STEM)
experiences.organization: Foster School of Business, University of Washington
experiences.summary: VP of Foster Tech Club and AI Product Builder, focused on product strategy, customer research, AI prototyping, go-to-market thinking, and product leadership.

projects.title: AI Hike Researcher
projects.description: Architected an agentic skill that automates real-time hike research across six safety-critical dimensions, reducing weekly planning time by 98% through staged research and personalized filtering.

projects.title: GenAI Music Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Built a mood and occasion-based sub-playlist curation engine using dynamic song-feature selection, improving relevance by 73% versus a rule-based baseline in project testing.

projects.title: Student Wellness Codex Hackathon Prototype
projects.description: Discovered student wellness pain points through six customer interviews, synthesized unmet needs, and built a behavioral psychology-informed prototype in three hours.

projects.title: Asana Sales Strategy and GTM Assessment
projects.description: Benchmarked Asana's sales strategy and go-to-market motion across nine dimensions, recommending clearer PLG versus SLG guidance and competitive differentiation; awarded first place among eight teams.

projects.title: HeyLily GenAI Scam-Call Assistant
projects.description: Led an 11-member design, engineering, and business team to build a GenAI scam-call assistant for seniors; ran 15+ user interviews, guided Android app development, and shaped a five-year B2B2C go-to-market model.

projects.title: Product Teardown Series
projects.description: Launched a Product Teardown series for Foster Tech Club to deconstruct world-class products, producing three events with 110+ attendees.

experiences.title: Product Management Fellowship
experiences.summary: Product management fellowship focused on structured product thinking, customer pain-point analysis, and capstone problem solving.

projects.title: Bumble Barney GenAI Wingman
projects.description: Analyzed 100 one-star Bumble app reviews, root-caused the recurring 'no matches' problem, and proposed Bumble Barney, a GenAI wingman concept intended to decrease no-match outcomes by 10%; placed second in the February capstone.

experiences.title: Senior Product Manager Technical Intern, L6, AWS FinOps
experiences.summary: Worked on AWS FinOps cost optimization strategy, customer discovery, roadmap prioritization, and PRFAQ-style product definition. Internal Amazon project details are intentionally not listed here.

experiences.title: Software Engineer 2, L62
experiences.summary: Built and led work across Azure Storage, Migrate, and Monitor, with experience spanning developer experience, distributed systems, UX performance, incident workflows, and cross-team delivery. Internal Microsoft project details are intentionally not listed here.

experiences.title: Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science
experiences.summary: Graduated with a 9.5 CGPA, ranked in the top 5% of the class.
